reviews.comment:
Exelente, se rellena un formulario al ingresar, podes ser socio o no, te cobran por dia y aceptan MPago. Todo muy ordenado y limpio.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent, you fill out a form upon arrival, you can be a member or not, they charge per day and accept Mercado Pago. Everything is very organized and clean.

reviews.comment:
Al costado de la ruta. Tiene aire. Los baños aceptables. Hoy 2/1/22 no cuentan con Infinia Diésel. El combustible está el mismo precio que en Bariloche.

(Translated by Google)
On the side of the road. It has air conditioning. The bathrooms are acceptable. Today, January 2, 2022, they don't have Infinia Diesel. Fuel prices are the same as in Bariloche.
